63.reason: Error: When i=0, ans[i-1] accesses ans[-1], which is out of bounds and causes undefined behavior.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: When i=0, ans[i-1] accesses ans[-1], which is out of bounds and causes undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: When i=0, ans[i-1] accesses ans[-1], which is out of bounds and causes undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Logical/Runtime Error] When i=0, accessing ans[i-1] (ans[-1]) causes an out-of-bounds array access and undefined behavior. The loop should start from i=1 to safely compare with the previous element.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [When i=0, ans[i-1] accesses ans[-1], which is out-of-bounds and causes undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Accessing ans[-1] when i=0 causes undefined behavior (out-of-bounds read).]

16.code: void cmp(const void* p, const void* q)
16.reason: 函数 cmp 应返回 int 类型，但被声明为 void，导致编译错误

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  函数 cmp 应返回 int 类型，但被声明为 void，导致编译错误
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  函数返回类型应为 int，而不是 void
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The comparison function for qsort must return int, not void. Returning values from a void function causes a compilation error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Compilation Error] The comparison function passed to qsort must return an int, not void. This return type mismatch violates the function pointer signature expected by qsort, causing a compilation error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [The comparison function for qsort must return an int, not void. This causes undefined behavior during sorting.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [The comparison function for qsort must return an int, not void. This causes undefined behavior during sorting.]

61.reason: 当 i=0 时，ans[i-1] 访问越界，应改为 i=1

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  当 i=0 时，ans[i-1] 访问越界，应改为 i=1
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  When i=0, accessing ans[i-1] causes out-of-bounds memory access. The loop should start from i=1.

34.reason: [Incorrect input parsing: format expects coefficient, then a char (space), then exponent, then a char (newline or space). But input format is "coef exp coef exp ...", so this reads incorrectly and may fail on last term.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect input parsing: format expects coefficient, then a char (space), then exponent, then a char (newline or space). But input format is "coef exp coef exp ...", so this reads incorrectly and may fail on last term.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect input parsing: the format assumes coefficient and exponent are separated by a char, but problem input has space between them and no delimiter after exponent except newline. This may read incorrectly or cause infinite loop.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Same input parsing error as above.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Same issue as above: incorrect scanf format for the given input specification.]

59.reason: [Passing a void-returning function to qsort leads to undefined behavior; the program may crash or sort incorrectly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Passing a function with 'void' return type as comparator to qsort is invalid; leads to undefined behavior.]
